run.selection_window: Created on or after 2026-05-07 and Anki Card = Needed

cards.text: Uptake from an inguinal hernia plug localizes to the {{c1::inguinal canal or hernia repair site}}, not a typical isolated nodal station.
cards.extra: Source: 2026-05-08 - PET False Positives. Correlate with CT appearance and surgical history.

cards.text: An inguinal hernia mesh plug can show {{c1::FDG or PSMA uptake}} and mimic {{c2::pelvic/inguinal nodal metastasis}}.
cards.extra: Source: 2026-05-08 - PET False Positives.

cards.text: After talc pleurodesis, pleural malignancy is more concerning when pleural thickening is {{c1::progressive}} or lacks a {{c2::high-density talc correlate}}.
cards.extra: Source: 2026-05-08 - PET False Positives.

cards.text: FDG uptake after talc pleurodesis is driven by {{c1::chronic granulomatous foreign-body inflammation}}.
cards.extra: Source: 2026-05-08 - PET False Positives.

cards.text: Talc pleurodesis can cause persistent {{c1::FDG-avid high-attenuation pleural thickening/nodularity}} for years, mimicking pleural malignancy.
cards.extra: Source: 2026-05-08 - PET False Positives. Key CT clue: high-attenuation pleural talc correlate.

cards.source_title: Cobalt 57 plate for outline in nuclear medicine scan
cards.text: A {{c1::Co-57 flood source or plate}} can be used as an external marker/source to outline anatomy during nuclear medicine imaging.
cards.extra: Source: Cobalt 57 plate for outline in nuclear medicine scan. Created 2026-05-12. Page body was otherwise empty.

cards.text: A dose calibrator is a {{c1::gas-filled ionization chamber}}, while a well counter is a {{c2::scintillation detector}}.
cards.extra: Source: Images of nuclear medicine equipment. Created 2026-05-08.

cards.text: A {{c1::dose calibrator}} measures radiopharmaceutical activity before administration.
cards.extra: Source: Images of nuclear medicine equipment. Created 2026-05-08.

cards.text: A {{c1::gamma camera}} detects emitted gamma photons to form planar nuclear medicine images.
cards.extra: Source: Images of nuclear medicine equipment. Created 2026-05-08.

cards.text: A {{c1::pinhole collimator}} on a gamma camera is used for high-resolution thyroid imaging.
cards.extra: Source: Images of nuclear medicine equipment. Created 2026-05-08.

cards.text: A thyroid uptake probe measures thyroid activity relative to the administered dose to calculate {{c1::radioiodine thyroid uptake}}.
cards.extra: Source: Images of nuclear medicine equipment. Created 2026-05-08.

cards.text: A {{c1::well counter}} measures very small radioactive samples in a well-shaped detector.
cards.extra: Source: Images of nuclear medicine equipment. Created 2026-05-08.

cards.text: {{c1::Jod-Basedow syndrome}} is {{c2::iodine-induced hyperthyroidism}}.
cards.extra: Source: Jod-Basedow syndrome. Created 2026-05-11.

cards.text: The iodine effect opposite Jod-Basedow syndrome is the {{c1::Wolff-Chaikoff effect}}, which transiently suppresses thyroid hormone production.
cards.extra: Source: Jod-Basedow syndrome. Created 2026-05-11.

cards.text: Jod-Basedow syndrome is most likely in patients with {{c1::autonomous thyroid tissue}}, especially multinodular goiter or autonomous nodules.
cards.extra: Source: Jod-Basedow syndrome. Created 2026-05-11.

cards.text: Recent {{c1::iodinated CT contrast}} followed by thyrotoxicosis should raise concern for Jod-Basedow syndrome.
cards.extra: Source: Jod-Basedow syndrome. Created 2026-05-11.

cards.text: Autonomous thyroid nodules in toxic multinodular goiter predispose to {{c1::Jod-Basedow syndrome}} after an iodine load.
cards.extra: Source: PLummer disease. Created 2026-05-11.

cards.text: Toxic multinodular goiter causes hyperthyroidism through {{c1::autonomously functioning thyroid nodules}}.
cards.extra: Source: PLummer disease. Created 2026-05-11.

cards.text: {{c1::Plummer disease}} is another name for {{c2::toxic multinodular goiter}}.
cards.extra: Source: PLummer disease. Created 2026-05-11. Key association: autonomously functioning thyroid nodules.

cards.text: On thyroid scintigraphy, Plummer disease classically shows {{c1::heterogeneous nodular uptake}} rather than diffuse homogeneous uptake.
cards.extra: Source: PLummer disease. Created 2026-05-11. Contrast with Graves disease.
